pageHero.title: YouTube Channels & Free Videos
pageHero.subtitle: The best free content for interview preparation, organized by focus area.

cards.title: ByteByteGo
cards.description: By Alex Xu (System Design Interview book author). Production-quality animations explaining distributed systems, databases, CDNs, and real architectures from Netflix, Uber, Airbnb.

cards.title: Gaurav Sen
cards.description: Popular free system design education. Covers database sharding, consistent hashing, CAP theorem, load balancing, caching patterns, and full design walkthroughs.

cards.title: Hussein Nasser
cards.description: For intermediate to advanced engineers. Database internals, networking protocols, backend performance. Deep dives into Postgres, Redis, Kafka, gRPC with live coding.

cards.title: Exponent
cards.description: FAANG interview prep with mock system design sessions. Great for seeing how interviews actually flow and getting used to the format.

cards.title: NeetCode
cards.description: 863K+ subscribers. Clear problem-solving strategies for Blind 75 and NeetCode 150. The go-to channel for structured LeetCode preparation with video explanations.

cards.title: CS Dojo
cards.description: By a former Google engineer. 1.92M subscribers. CS fundamentals and interview prep. Mixes whiteboard concepts with actual code for clear understanding.

cards.title: Clement Mihailescu (AlgoExpert)
cards.description: AlgoExpert creator. 275K+ subscribers. FAANG interview strategies and coding problem walkthroughs with real-world context.

cards.title: Abdul Bari
cards.description: Teaches algorithms like a university professor. Thorough explanations with hand-drawn visualizations. Perfect for deep theoretical understanding.

cards.title: William Fiset
cards.description: In-depth tutorials on algorithms and data structures. Makes complex topics approachable. Great complement to problem-solving practice.

cards.title: Back To Back SWE
cards.description: Clear explanations of complex coding interview topics. Known for breaking down difficult problems into understandable steps.
